summary: Implemented state-driven lighting, fog, and occlusion system to visually communicate Tower pressure.
achievements: Created LightingManager to map runtime state to lighting, fog, and occlusion parameters.
Defined robust configuration contracts for lighting and fog profiles.
Integrated dynamic lighting parameter resolution into IsometricRenderManager.
Ensured lighting effects respond dynamically to pressure and enemy hunt states.
Validated lighting and fog rendering pipeline with tests.
